name: balloon_inflate
description: Install balloon service and verify memory reporting via the service

test_steps.desc: Verify Balloon PnP device is present and OK
test_steps.guest_run: $d = Get-PnpDevice | Where-Object { $_.HardwareID -match 'VEN_1AF4&DEV_1002|VEN_1AF4&DEV_1045' }; if (-not $d) { throw 'Balloon device not found' }; Write-Output "PASS: Balloon device $($d.FriendlyName) is $($d.Status)"; if ($d.Status -eq 'Error') { throw 'Balloon device in Error state: ' + $d.ConfigManagerErrorCode }

$blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $blnsvr) { throw 'blnsvr.exe not found in driver package' }; & $blnsvr.FullName -i; Start-Sleep 2; $svc = Get-Service BalloonService -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if (-not $svc) { throw 'BalloonService not registered after install' }; if ($svc.Status -ne 'Running') { Start-Service BalloonService }; Write-Output "PASS: BalloonService is $($(Get-Service BalloonService).Status)"

test_steps.desc: Verify balloon driver module is running
test_steps.guest_run: $d = (driverquery /fo csv | ConvertFrom-Csv) | Where-Object { $_.'Module Name' -eq 'balloon' }; if (-not $d) { throw 'balloon driver module not running' }; Write-Output "PASS: balloon driver is $($d.State)"

cleanup.guest_run: $blnsvr = Get-ChildItem -Recurse C:\AutoHCK\balloon_pkg -Filter blnsvr.exe -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if ($blnsvr) { Stop-Service BalloonService -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; & $blnsvr.FullName -u }
